title: centaurea cinerea
intro: Centaurea cinerea, also known as the White Cockle or Hoary Cockle, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been utilized to treat various health issues such as skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Centaurea cinerea include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Centaurea cinerea typically involve infusions, tinctures, and dried flowers, which can be used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
